rationale: Ukraine actively strikes Russian energy infrastructure, signaling continued offensive capacity; Iran deal uncertainty keeps US attention divided; war background remains at maximum level.

top_events.title: Ukraine strikes Russian energy terminal
top_events.summary: Ukraine continues offensive strikes on Russian energy infrastructure, demonstrating continued military capability and intent to pressure Russia economically — directly relevant to war trajectory.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump says Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: Continued US focus on Iran deal keeps American diplomatic attention divided, potentially delaying or reducing focus on Ukraine military aid and diplomatic support.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon as Middle East tensions rise
top_events.summary: Escalating Middle East conflict further diverts Western attention and resources from Ukraine's war effort, a secondary but real concern for Kyiv.
